dataset.label: SME portfolio
dataset.description: Synthetic SME banking portfolio with weekly cashflow health facts and corroborating context signals.

dimensions.label: Portfolio
dimensions.description: Portfolio-wide aggregate view across all regions and sectors.

dimensions.label: Region
dimensions.description: Regional segment of the SME portfolio.

dimensions.label: Sector
dimensions.description: Industry segment of the SME portfolio.

dimensions.label: Region / sector
dimensions.description: Joint region and sector slice used for the most granular breakdowns.

metrics.label: Cashflow health score
metrics.description: Weekly stability score for the SME portfolio combining payment coverage, balance direction, low-balance exposure, and overdue exposure.
exampleQuestions: Why did SME cashflow health drop last week?
Why did cash flow health drop last week in the North West?
Why did hospitality cashflow health drop this week?
Compare cashflow health this week vs last week.
Compare North West vs London & South East cashflow health last week.

metrics.label: At-risk account count
metrics.description: Weekly count of accounts showing sustained cashflow stress, based on low-balance days or overdue exposure within the selected week.
exampleQuestions: What makes up at-risk accounts by region and sector last week?
Break down at-risk accounts by region this week.
Show the at-risk account split by sector last week.

sources.label: Postgres facts
sources.description: Structured weekly and daily analytical facts, including accounts, dimensions, and cashflow health aggregates.

sources.label: Mongo context
sources.description: Contextual corroboration from complaints, service incidents, risk alerts, and relationship-manager notes.

sources.label: Semantic manifest
sources.description: Semantic definitions for metrics, dimensions, aliases, supported capabilities, and example questions.

supportedQuestions: Why did SME cashflow health drop last week?
Compare cashflow health this week vs last week.
What makes up at-risk accounts by region and sector last week?
uncertaintyNotes: Semantic aliases and story anchors are currently curated by hand for the built-in SME sample dataset.
Execution stays grounded in repository-backed facts even when planning semantics are manifest-driven.
